summary: Dual menu bar icons show remaining disk percentage and free GB, each toggled independently from Settings or the popover.
introduced: Two menu bar readouts: remaining percentage and free space in GB, each with color-coded text based on how much space is left
Click either icon for drive details, manual refresh, and toggles to show or hide percentage and GB independently
New Settings → Startup toggle: Open DiskWise at login, independent of the menu bar monitor
changed: Turning on menu bar disk display no longer registers DiskWise for login at startup or opens System Settings
Menu bar refresh interval adapts to remaining space (15s critical, 30s low, 60s healthy)
Settings and View menu offer separate toggles for percentage and free GB displays
Launch prompt and setup instructions updated for dual-icon menu bar monitor
fixed: Removed v0.3.9 from the Sparkle update feed so clients stay on the supported 0.3.8 release line
